revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-8-170

An auto-transformer in which at least one of the external connections may be moved along the winding to vary the turns ratio and so to control the alternating supply voltage output.

{{IALAFooter}}
